class.name: ASNameTagHistoricalEntry
class.brief_description: Historical entry for NAME tag changes.
class.description:
ASNameTagHistoricalEntry records when NAME tags (persistent identity tags) are added or removed from a component. Stores the tag name, target, timestamp, tick, and whether it was an addition or removal.
NAME tags typically represent persistent states like: - State.Stunned, State.Stealthed, State.Flying - Class.Warrior, Class.Mage, Class.Rogue - Team.Red, Team.Blue, Team.Neutral
Used by the historical query system to track state changes over time, enable rollback functionality, and support complex game logic that depends on recent state changes.
Example queries: "Was the player stunned in the last 3 seconds?" or "How many times did the player enter stealth recently?"

method.name: get_target
method.description: Returns the target node, or null if not available.

method.name: set_target
method.description: Sets the target node (stores ObjectID internally).

method.name: to_dict
method.description: Converts the historical entry to a Dictionary for serialization.

method.name: from_dict
method.description: Loads historical entry from a Dictionary created by to_dict().

members.member: The NAME tag that was added or removed.
ObjectID of the node this tag change affected.
Timestamp when this tag change occurred (seconds since start).
Tick ID for multiplayer synchronization and rollback.
True if the tag was added, false if it was removed.
